tagline.en: Sow seeds that explode with color!
tagline.da: Saa froe der eksploderer i farver!

theme.hero_task: Sow nasturtium seeds in Bed A

tasks.action: Sow nasturtium seeds around edges of Bed A

prompt.en: Push each wrinkly seed into the soil -- these make orange and red flowers you can EAT!
prompt.da: Tryk hvert rynket froe ned i jorden -- de laver orange og roede blomster, du kan SPISE!

tasks.action: Sow broccoli seeds in Bed C

prompt.en: Tiny seeds for a big plant -- broccoli looks like little trees!
prompt.da: Smaa froe til en stor plante -- broccoli ligner smaa traeer!

prompt.en: The warm weather means more water! Check every bed.
prompt.da: Det varme vejr betyder mere vand! Tjek hvert bed.

tasks.action: Harvest second round of pea shoots from Bed A

prompt.en: The pea shoots grew back after cutting! Snip again for a garden snack.
prompt.da: Aerteskuddene voksede tilbage efter klipning! Klip igen til en havesnack.

tasks.action: Sow leek seeds in Bed C

prompt.en: Leeks are slow growers but worth the wait -- they'll be ready in autumn.
prompt.da: Porrer gror langsomt, men det er ventetiden vaerd -- de er klar til efteraaret.

growth_events.event: Second batch radishes (W18 sowing) developing root swelling

prompt.en: Gently brush the soil around the radish -- can you see the pink top?
prompt.da: Boerst forsigtigt jorden vaek ved radisen -- kan du se den lyserode top?

growth_events.event: Tomato establishing in new bed with first new growth

prompt.en: The tomato is settling in! Can you see new tiny leaves at the top?
prompt.da: Tomaten har slaaet sig ned! Kan du se nye smaa blade i toppen?

sowing_tasks.action: Sow fourth succession radish in Bed A
Sow third succession lettuce in Bed C
Sow second pea planting in Bed B
